signals.headline: Powell Confirms Tariff-Driven Goods Inflation to Peak Q1/Mid-2026, No Further Rate Cuts Amid Divided FOMC and Weakening
signals.raw:

signals.headline: Elon Musk April Tweet Count Markets Heating Up | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Elon Musk April Tweet Count Markets Heating Up | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Polymarket traders on X are buzzing about active tweet prediction markets, particularly "Elon Musk # tweets April 17 - April 24, 2026?" and the broader "Elon Musk # tweets in April 2026?", with the 1080-1119 tweet range priced at 18% probability amid $17.1M total trading volume across 130+ related markets[1][2][3].
